description: Spine GraphRAG Gold Standard Questions - Draft v0.1

schema.id: Domain prefix + number (DG=Degenerative, DF=Deformity, TR=Trauma, TU=Tumor, BS=Basic Science)
schema.question: Clinical question in English

questions.question: What is the evidence comparing UBE (biportal endoscopic) versus conventional TLIF for lumbar spinal stenosis in terms of ODI improvement and complication rates?
questions.question_kr: 요추 척추관 협착증에서 UBE vs 기존 TLIF의 ODI 개선 및 합병증 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the current evidence for cervical disc replacement (CDR) versus ACDF in 2-level cervical disc disease regarding adjacent segment degeneration?
questions.question_kr: 2분절 경추 추간판 질환에서 CDR vs ACDF의 인접분절 퇴행 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What are the risk factors for cage subsidence after MIS-TLIF and their impact on clinical outcomes?
questions.question_kr: MIS-TLIF 후 cage subsidence의 위험인자와 임상 결과에 대한 영향은?

questions.question: What is the best evidence for surgical treatment of lumbar disc herniation: microdiscectomy versus endoscopic discectomy outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 요추 추간판 탈출증 수술: 미세현미경 vs 내시경 추간판절제술의 결과 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for the use of BMP-2 in lumbar interbody fusion regarding fusion rates, complications, and cancer risk?
questions.question_kr: 요추 추체간 유합술에서 BMP-2 사용의 유합률, 합병증, 암 위험 근거는?

questions.question: What is the role of laminoplasty versus laminectomy with fusion for multilevel cervical myelopathy? Which approach has better outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 다분절 경추 척수증에서 후궁성형술 vs 후궁절제+유합술의 역할과 어느 접근법이 우수한가?

questions.question: What is the latest evidence from RCTs comparing lateral lumbar interbody fusion (LLIF/XLIF) versus TLIF for degenerative spondylolisthesis?
questions.question_kr: 퇴행성 척추전방전위증에서 LLIF/XLIF vs TLIF 비교 최신 RCT 근거는?

questions.question: What evidence exists for the effectiveness of epidural steroid injections in lumbar spinal stenosis, and when should surgery be recommended?
questions.question_kr: 요추 척추관 협착증에서 경막외 스테로이드 주사의 효과와 수술 권유 시점에 대한 근거는?

questions.question: What are the clinical outcomes and complications of robotic-assisted pedicle screw placement compared to freehand technique?
questions.question_kr: 로봇 보조 척추경 나사못 삽입 vs 프리핸드 기법의 임상 결과 및 합병증 비교는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for full-endoscopic lumbar discectomy (FELD/PELD) learning curve and its impact on outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 전내시경 요추 추간판절제술(FELD/PELD)의 학습 곡선과 결과에 미치는 영향 근거는?

questions.question: What is the optimal upper instrumented vertebra (UIV) selection for Lenke 5C adult degenerative scoliosis: T10 vs L1?
questions.question_kr: Lenke 5C 성인 퇴행성 측만증에서 최적 UIV 선택: T10 vs L1?

questions.question: What is the incidence and risk factors of proximal junctional kyphosis (PJK) after adult spinal deformity surgery?
questions.question_kr: 성인 척추 변형 수술 후 근위부 접합부 후만증(PJK)의 발생률과 위험인자는?

questions.question: What are the outcomes of three-column osteotomies (PSO, VCR) for fixed sagittal imbalance, and what is the complication profile?
questions.question_kr: 고정된 시상면 불균형에서 3주 절골술(PSO, VCR)의 결과와 합병증 프로파일은?

questions.question: What is the evidence for surgical versus conservative treatment of adolescent idiopathic scoliosis (AIS) with Cobb angle 40-50 degrees?
questions.question_kr: Cobb angle 40-50도 청소년 특발성 측만증에서 수술 vs 보존적 치료 근거는?

questions.question: What is the role of anterior column reconstruction (ACR/ALIF) combined with posterior fixation in adult spinal deformity, compared to posterior-only approaches?
questions.question_kr: 성인 척추 변형에서 전방주 재건(ACR/ALIF)+후방 고정 vs 후방 단독 접근법의 역할은?

questions.question: What is the evidence for short-segment versus long-segment fixation in thoracolumbar burst fractures (AO type A3-A4)?
questions.question_kr: 흉요추부 방출 골절(AO A3-A4)에서 단분절 vs 장분절 고정의 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for surgical versus conservative management of odontoid fractures (Anderson type II) in elderly patients?
questions.question_kr: 고령 환자의 치돌기 골절(Anderson type II)에서 수술 vs 보존적 치료 근거는?

questions.question: What is the optimal timing of surgery for traumatic spinal cord injury, and what evidence supports early versus delayed decompression?
questions.question_kr: 외상성 척수 손상에서 최적 수술 시기와 조기 vs 지연 감압의 근거는?

questions.question: What are the outcomes of percutaneous pedicle screw fixation compared to open fixation for thoracolumbar fractures?
questions.question_kr: 흉요추부 골절에서 경피적 vs 개방형 척추경 나사못 고정의 결과 비교는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for vertebroplasty and kyphoplasty in osteoporotic compression fractures: efficacy versus sham procedures?
questions.question_kr: 골다공증성 압박골절에서 척추성형술/풍선후만성형술의 효과: sham procedure 대비 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for surgical intervention based on SINS (Spinal Instability Neoplastic Score) in metastatic spine disease?
questions.question_kr: 전이성 척추 질환에서 SINS 기반 수술적 개입의 근거는?

questions.question: What is the current evidence for separation surgery followed by stereotactic radiosurgery (SSRS) for metastatic epidural spinal cord compression?
questions.question_kr: 전이성 경막외 척수 압박에서 분리 수술 후 정위 방사선 수술(SSRS)의 현재 근거는?

questions.question: What are the outcomes and prognostic factors for en bloc spondylectomy in primary malignant spine tumors?
questions.question_kr: 원발성 악성 척추 종양에서 전절제술(en bloc spondylectomy)의 결과 및 예후 인자는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for denosumab versus surgery for cervical spine giant cell tumor (GCT)?
questions.question_kr: 경추 거대세포종(GCT)에서 denosumab vs 수술적 치료의 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for the role of Modic changes in low back pain pathogenesis and treatment response?
questions.question_kr: Modic 변화가 요통 병인 및 치료 반응에 미치는 역할에 대한 근거는?

questions.question: What is the current evidence for stem cell therapy in intervertebral disc degeneration?
questions.question_kr: 추간판 퇴행에서 줄기세포 치료의 현재 근거는?

questions.question: What biomechanical evidence exists comparing different interbody cage materials (PEEK vs titanium vs 3D-printed) for lumbar fusion?
questions.question_kr: 요추 유합에서 추체간 케이지 재료(PEEK vs 티타늄 vs 3D프린팅) 비교 생역학적 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for the effect of smoking on spinal fusion outcomes and pseudarthrosis rates?
questions.question_kr: 흡연이 척추 유합 결과 및 가관절증 발생률에 미치는 영향 근거는?

questions.question: What is the role of navigation and augmented reality in spine surgery: current evidence for accuracy and clinical outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 척추 수술에서 네비게이션 및 증강현실의 역할: 정확도 및 임상 결과에 대한 현재 근거는?
